daily.summary: The Moon moves into your sign today for a stay of a couple of days, dear Aries, and your emotions are on your sleeve. Today, you may have additional obligations to attend to, and you’re a self-starter. There can be a strong focus on analyzing a past or unfinished matter. You may want to do something tangible or symbolic to let go of negative emotional energy. Think in terms of detoxing and decluttering, as you have excellent energy with you to do so. You might also find it enjoyable to work in some level of solitude now. You see a reason to put a positive spin on an issue now, and it comes as a relief.

monthly.summary:
The following are monthly horoscopes for Aries, typically available on the last day of the previous month. Cafe Astrology divides its monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here(you’ll need a birth time for an accurate Ascendant sign).

What are the dates/months for Aries?You have an Aries Sun sign if you were born from approximately March 21st to April 20th. However, the start and end dates vary from year to year, so if you were born around the start or end date of a sign, be sure to check your sign here:What is my Sun Sign? – Calculatorfor a definitive answer.

We divide our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor theCafe Astrology Ascendant Calculator tool.

There’s a distinct focus on your inner world and past matters in March, dear Aries, but you’re heading into a power period for activity and involvement. Venus spends the 6th to 30th in Aries, boosting the love and pleasure factors in your life. As such, although you're keeping to yourself in many ways, it’s not limiting your personal appeal! Others are drawn to you more than usual--you are the desired one right now.

The Full Moon on the 3rd is a Lunar Eclipse, and it brings some chaos on the job or daily front, but nothing you can’t handle. This eclipse reminds you of the need to find a work-rest balance. It calls you to action, mainly to take better care of daily routines, wellness, and work matters. Seeing the flaws in current systems can be irritating, but can lead to significant improvements.

yearly.overview: The first half of the year is powerful for filling your inner well and strengthening ties with loved ones, dear Aries. Mid-year, a new cycle begins that encourages you to explore your playful, dramatic, and creative side.
yearly.summary:
The first half of the year is powerful for filling your inner well and strengthening ties with loved ones, dear Aries. Mid-year, a new cycle begins that encourages you to explore your playful, dramatic, and creative side.

But first, Neptune and Saturn enter your sign early in 2026. These big moves were teased last year, but now they’re happening! There will be times when you need to slow down and choose your battles wisely. You’re moving away from false paths that no longer serve you well or transforming them into more suitable ones! It’s a process, and it’s about your identity, initiative, and sense of independence–all “I” words, and it’s appropriate, because it’s all about you.

Saturn in your sign is a demanding transit, and it’s with you from February this year until April 2028. Through its influence, you learn to count on yourself. Of course, your relationship with yourself affects all life “departments” in profound ways. The responsibilities you may have let slide in the past come up for close attention, and while it can sometimes feel like an onslaught, you are more than equipped to meet the challenges.

Keep in mind that those things that you’ve managed well in the past are now being rewarded. Saturn is karmic – you are experiencing what you are due at this point. It’s a powerful time to get your life back on track. The process of getting closer to your true self will involve some restructuring of your attitudes toward professional goals and images.

At the same time, Neptune is now solidly in your sign starting in January, and this influence brings your imagination, idealism, and spirituality to the surface. So, while Saturn is asking you to define and structure your life in key ways, Neptune has a longer-term mission to break down some of your walls. Perhaps you need to define things before you begin the work of freeing yourself from overly strict labels.

You can be hesitant about sharing yourself with anyone except those closest to you (family and people who are close enough to be like family) in the first half of the year, after which you blossom. This is especially true if you have done a lot of “work” on centering yourself and learning about your desires, wishes, and needs.

Jupiter brings the expansion of fun, entertainment, and, for some, romance into your lives in the second half of the year. July features powerful aspects, and new ventures, especially creative ones, can be exciting and innovative – even cutting-edge. New experiences and opportunities are in the cards, and it’s about time! The second half of the year is about opening up. You’re taking things in stride and confident in yourself. Romance can be enjoyable. You’re more fertile and creative. People are paying attention to and enjoying you.

Uranus moves out of your money house permanently on April 25th, which can help steady, settle, and stabilize your resources and finances after a rather lengthy period of some unpredictability in these areas. Of special interest, too, is where it’s going now since Uranus spends seven years in a sign and is known to destabilize and excite the senses. From now until 2033, Uranus will transit your sector of communications, mental interests, the mind, mental outlook, transportation, and connections. This transit changes how you learn, think, communicate, and connect. New interests can come on suddenly this year and beyond. You’re challenging some of the beliefs or modes of thinking you’ve held and employed for most of your life now, and it can lead to breakthroughs and perhaps some interruptions in your studies or daily life.

It’s an exciting, although not always consistent, period for learning and sharing. Uranus harmonizes with Pluto in your social sector, and your desire to express yourself, along with your attitude towards networking and groups, is evolving.

This growing need to develop and diversify on mental levels can take you to interesting places in 2026. There is likely to be some trial and error involved with your interests and studies, and you may want to watch for sudden attractions to impractical ventures. Fortunately, a friendship, project, cause, or group association can blossom.

daily.summary: The Moon moves into the sign behind yours, dear Taurus, where it will stay for a couple of days. You need some extra time to yourself or simply away from the grind and routine. Aim to get rid of extra mental clutter for the best results now. The Moon meets with Saturn today, reminding you of what’s unfinished or a current challenge. Focusing on others can be rewarding, particularly if you are helping out. This is a great time for making friends and connections, even with the potential for minor misunderstandings. You can be particularly motivated to resolve an old problem, particularly friendship- or people-related. You might also be interested in reviving an old idea and bringing it back to life in a new way. You may be finding more value in the connections you make, yet you're also building your inner stores, looking for meaning in life from deep within yourself.

monthly.summary:
The following are monthly horoscopes for the Taurus zodiac sign. Cafe Astrology divides its monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign.

If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor ourQuick Ascendant Calculator here.

The following are monthly horoscopes for the Taurus zodiac sign. Cafe Astrology divides its monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

March brings plenty of opportunities to explore your social and happiness goals, dear Taurus. It’s a time of interesting developments with friends, group activities, collaboration, networking, and attention to long-term projects. While demands on your time can often be quite pleasant, you do need to pay particular attention to managing your time effectively with Mercury retrograde until the 20th. Delays and backtracking can be part of the picture. The New Moon on the 18th brings a fresh start with friends.

Friendships might be renewed or revitalized, even with (and possibly because) there are hurdles to clear and issues to resolve. While the month finds you in mostly good spirits, there are some key times to watch. Expect the Lunar Eclipse to bring some level of mystery to the first week of March. It occurs on the 3rd, and it brings emotions to the surface that are valid, but information coming to light now may not be complete. It’s best to reserve judgment.

yearly.overview: Jupiter continues to open the lines of communication in your life this year, and later, it boosts your home and family life. Uranus completes its transition out of your sign, helping stabilize your life.
yearly.summary:
Jupiter continues to open the lines of communication in your life this year, and later, it boosts your home and family life. Uranus completes its transition out of your sign, helping stabilize your life.

New interests and learning are powerful themes in 2026, but later this year, there can be a real settling-down process going on in your life. Your domestic world comes into stronger focus, and you can feel the need to expand, grow, and improve. Some may move into larger or more appropriate accommodations, while others work on improving their living conditions. You are likely to find more value – and joy – in your family and your domestic life.

The first half of the year is rich in opportunities to expand your knowledge and make pleasant contact with others. There can be a real feeling of connectedness with friends, siblings, your neighborhood, or your community. Interests expand. Communications projects are well-starred, and you might secure, complete, or refine a major project. Transportation matters can improve.

With Uranus leaving your sign in April (permanently this time), you’re likely to feel less on edge, rebellious, or triggered. You no longer feel the need to make a splash when it comes to asserting your independence. Relationships also begin to settle down. You’re closing an important chapter in your life. Uranus was in Taurus for many years, pushing you to find yourself.

As Uranus embarks on its lengthy journey through your resources sector, freelance work or various sources of revenue can be a theme. Connecting with your longer-term, overarching goals can lead to a new relationship with your money and things. With Saturn leaving your sector of business earnings this year and Uranus moving into your money sector, there can be a theme of freedom from restrictions on earnings or a changing money landscape.

It can be a time of some upheaval and unpredictability, but also of innovation and progress with matters of income, personal things, comfort, and security. Whether money means freedom to you or freedom is about detachment from certain possessions, this is a time of an evolving relationship with your material affairs.

Dreams are vibrant and involved this year. You pay more attention to synchronicities, signs, symbols, and omens in your life. You are building your faith in all that is “unseen.” In truth, there can be a lot of work done behind the scenes. While supporting others or dealing with problems in your private time can be draining at times, this can be an important time for facing fears and letting go of old attachments.

There can be family expansions or activities that sometimes clash with your need for independence or with your personal or professional plans. The demands of career and family can be especially strong, and finding a balance is challenging but also important, especially in July. This year, you’re battling tension about performance and reputation as you discover your ambitions. However, you mustn’t let this stress reach a level that interferes with your enjoyment of opportunities.

Overall, the year spotlights innovative or technological improvements, new ideas, and a forward-looking, happy energy with finances and home life. Loans or support may be forthcoming. A partner could be doing quite well at this time, helping your overall financial picture.

What you value the most is changing, and as this evolves, you’re building your confidence for more expressive periods to come. Major new projects begun from mid-2026 to mid-2027 can turn out to be very rewarding, profitable, and long-term, so lay down your foundations well.

daily.summary: Something might happen that makes a long-term goal seem more realizable today, dear Gemini. You may have a strong need to be productive, though your focus is more on happiness goals than on practical pursuits. The Moon moves into your social sector for a couple of days, and the key to emotional fulfillment right now may be to focus on your special wishes and dreams. Someone is more reliable than usual, having their priorities straight. You could be reworking old ideas, projects, or plans with great success. You're willing to put in the time to reach your goals, although it's not the most patient of days. In fact, with Mercury ending its retrograde tomorrow, the shift happening now can be confusing, so major decision-making should wait.

monthly.summary:
We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor ourQuick Ascendant Lookup.

Monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

In March, your focus continues on your career, reputation, status, life direction, and responsibilities to the outside world, dear Gemini. Influences call your attention to your long-range goals and ambitions. But while March can be a higher-profile period, you can find beautiful ways to detach and detox. Friendship, happiness goals, and your special projects and plans are in good shape this month.

This month is strong for new approaches in your career, reputation, networking, friendships, as well as education, sharing or publishing, and travel. The New Moon on the 18th brings fresh energy for career and reputation matters, although it’s better to wait until after the 20th to launch new projects since Mercury is retrograde until then. It's also a time when inspiration comes suddenly, and you could pick up fresh, and possibly radically different, interests or goals.

The Lunar Eclipse on the 3rd is designed to awaken your true feelings about a matter, but there's so much noise surrounding it that it's best to take your time with your revelations before acting on them. This eclipse ultimately magnifies flaws with your living conditions or arrangements, personal life, emotional world, home, or family. Finding a better balance between your professional and personal life is an ongoing theme in your life, and this lunation furthers things along. Family matters or personal needs that have been ignored or brushed aside can erupt now for special consideration.

yearly.overview: Jupiter’s influence brings more pleasure in what you have in the first half of 2026, dear Gemini. Personal finances, communications, and learning are prominent themes in your life this year. Uranus moves into Gemini in April, this time for the long haul. It’s a year to explore your needs and pursue your dreams.
yearly.summary:
Jupiter’s influence brings more pleasure in what you have in the first half of 2026, dear Gemini. Personal finances, communications, and learning are prominent themes in your life this year. Uranus moves into Gemini in April, this time for the long haul. It’s a year to explore your needs and pursue your dreams.

2026 is a strong year for building and expanding, as well as for learning and connecting. More day-to-day contact with friends and family can be healing and pleasurable. In the first half of the year, you may be growing your material resources. It’s a time of abundance on some level – you might acquire or purchase something of value that you’ve always wanted, invest, or enjoy an increase in business and income. There can be a strong emphasis on comfort and enjoying simple (and sometimes not so simple) pleasures. You can take great pleasure in growing a business or enjoying the comforts of a relationship.

But while you’re in some ways settling in, you’re also exploring your independence with Uranus in your sign for seven years! This planet awakens your consciousness to areas of your life in which you’ve felt restricted. There may be unexpected events that free you from confining situations or past conditioning patterns. You are more inspired now, and your personality bubbles with bursts of enthusiasm. Uranus visits your sign from April 25th onward.

There can be a significant break from the past that propels your life forward. It’s important to watch for rebellious behavior — to aim to act rather than react. Uranus transits can be times when there is a significant new influence, person, or path in your life that rather dramatically deviates from your version of normal. Those born from May 20-26 and with a Gemini Ascendant of 0 to 6 degrees are most affected by this transit in 2026, and this energy is stirring for the rest of the sign.

You are looking to the future, not to the past, and the desire to leap forward into new and unexplored territory is powerful. You might find yourself attracting people or lessons into your life that encourage you to detach from traditions or conventions that have limited your growth in the past. Anything that broadens your thinking and life experience is especially important to you at this stage of your life.

More discipline and structure in your social life, with friends, and happiness pursuits can benefit you greatly. Many Geminis will start or build businesses this year that will benefit them for years to come. This will not come without hard work and persistence, but you are likely to enjoy the process more if you focus on what really matters in the long term. You’re reorganizing and changing things up so that you can improve your friendships and connections–or your feeling of connectedness, in general. It’s about making room for connections, relationships, and projects that empower you rather than hold you back.

In a sense, you’re going through a clean-up or a period of fine-tuning in your social life so that you can live more authentically. The benefits of this reset are great, even if they’re not immediately apparent.

The second half of the year finds you more communicative. It’s a strong period for a relationship based on communication, a publishing effort, a different course of study or interest, or a new business idea. More involvement with your immediate environment, community, and neighborhood can be in the spotlight. You’re finding your voice and more fully enjoying what you’re doing, learning, teaching, and sharing.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

For Gemini, you are in good shape to draw on experience, good karma, and your inner wisdom to further your career or material goals or meet your responsibilities to the outside world. Teaching or guiding may be connected with your work, and work done behind the scenes can pay off. You’re getting to a very healthy balance between optimism and practicality. Pacing yourself comes more naturally to you now.

daily.summary: You can feel more directed and purposeful than usual today, dear Cancer, although on this day before Mercury ends its retrograde, it's best to wait and see for new beginnings. Still, your responsibilities and performance are high on your list of interests, and you can feel a strong need to manage a situation or put more energy into your practical priorities. Resourcefulness helps you greatly. While words exchanged are imperfect, you can enjoy some exciting ideas to break out of the usual routine. Watch for a tendency to speak before thinking, but aim to enjoy the high energy for your ideas and interests.

monthly.summary:
Monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Keep in mind that if you know your Ascendant, it’s best to read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor look up your Ascendant quickly with ourWhat’s My Ascendanttool.

We’ve divided our 2026 monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

March brings great vibes for exploring and discovering, dear Cancer, particularly different ideas, places, and experiences. You have a strong showing of planets in your solar ninth house, pulling up themes of learning, non-routine activities, sharing ideas, publishing, connecting with new people, expanding your interests and mind, and travel. March is a month for being more experimental, spontaneous, and adventurous than usual. The need to “get away from it all” is compelling. You’re looking for spirit-lifting activities! Still, a growing theme this month is about work, responsibilities, and long-term goals.

But first, the Full Moon on the 3rd is a Lunar Eclipse, and it can bring quite a scurry of activity in the surrounding weeks. It happens when Mercury is already retrograde, and delayed travel or issues with communication and transportation systems in your life can wreak some havoc, although this is nothing you can’t fix. In fact, you may be better off for it. Aim to refine things rather than push something ahead. Fortunately, there can be important discoveries, ideas, and changes in your mindset or attitude. Watch for impulsive self-expression, but give your emotions and epiphanies weight. Recent inattention to details or daily affairs may need to be rectified.

Pay particular attention to new information and ideas coming to you from the 4th to the 8th, when there can be a new understanding of past matters that can eventually fuel successful new plans and beginnings. The conversations you have now can be inspiring and enlightening.

yearly.overview: It’s an exciting year for you, dear Cancer. You have expansive Jupiter in your sign until mid-year. If you haven’t taken advantage of its gifts and blessings, it’s now time to do so. It’s an ideal period for a very positive new personal beginning and awakening. You enjoy increased confidence, along with the confidence of others in you. Your personality, image, body image, and morale expand to new levels, and you see whole new possibilities. The year also involves you more intensely with your work or status and material goals. Career winds are shifting!
yearly.summary:
It’s an exciting year for you, dear Cancer. You have expansive Jupiter in your sign until mid-year. If you haven’t taken advantage of its gifts and blessings, it’s now time to do so. It’s an ideal period for a very positive new personal beginning and awakening. You enjoy increased confidence, along with the confidence of others in you. Your personality, image, body image, and morale expand to new levels, and you see whole new possibilities. The year also involves you more intensely with your work or status and material goals. Career winds are shifting!

You are doing your professional and public life quite differently this year, and you are capable of solid success. A deliberate, steady pace is important when pursuing your career, reputation, and life path goals. Certainly, there can be more pressure in these areas. Transits bring your responsibilities to the “outside world” to light, and at times, to the test. It’s a pivotal period for you regarding the structures you’ve built and your career or reputation.

This can be a time of achievement, recognition, new responsibilities, and harvest on career fronts. Others are taking you more seriously, which can be rewarding, but at times stressful. It can also be a time when poor past decisions come to light. It’s best to follow the rules and get organized.

Your increased personal confidence gives you more freedom to do what you want and experience life on a “new and improved” level. The second half of 2026 brings new and quite remarkable energy to your finances, personal possessions, as well as your sense of comfort and security. There is a stronger focus on the simple pleasures and comforts of life, though you might also have your eye on something expensive or indulgent. It’s actually a good time to make larger, significant purchases, generally speaking, and within reason. Earnings might expand now, but it’s very important to be grateful at this time in your life.

Look to develop, but don’t overreach. Excess can trip you up at a time when you have real, solid opportunities to improve your lot in life. Depending on what you want at this time in your life, it can be a time of more business or more leisure – whichever helps you feel content and leads to a feeling of abundance.

From April 25th onward, your social life evens out and steadies after years of a bit of turbulence or unreliability. Ideally, you’ve met some inspiring people and learned a great deal more about your associations and which ones represented you well. A new cycle begins that can stir up your private life (your private life becomes more “colorful” now), and interjects some unusual coincidences into your life.

It’s a process that slowly but surely detaches you from elements of your past that have limited your growth. This may be a time of radical changes in alliances and allegiances. Aim to free yourself from outdated ideas and attitudes that are keeping you attached to unhealthy paths.

In general, you are moving towards deeper thinking and the desire for depth and maturity in your connections to others. There may be some drama related to debts, shared assets, dependencies, or power dynamics in a relationship. Balancing your attention to your career or reputation with your attention to your private life and downtime can boost both areas of life. There can be breakthroughs on a psychological or intimate level, giving you a solid sense that you’re moving forward.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

For Cancer, learning and teaming up with others through study groups or friendships based on shared beliefs and interests can benefit you. It’s a good time to draw some boundaries and cement long-term friendships or group associations, while also allowing room for spontaneity and a sense of freedom. There is a real sense that as you build your skills and attend to your practical affairs, you’ll connect with people or causes that inspire and encourage you.

daily.summary: You might enjoy some serious learning, studying, sharing, or thinking today, dear Leo, with the Moon conjunct Saturn and the Sun parallel to Saturn. Saturn is currently transiting your sector of spirit, the higher mind, and sharing ideas. Today, you want engaging experiences and a break from the routine or a change of scenery, but you also want to be productive. You can feel quite ambitious to improve your situation. While there could be a difference in opinion that sticks with you and frustrates you, you're also in good shape for thinking outside the box. You’re looking forward to special pursuits, experiences, commitments, and attachments.

monthly.summary:
Cafe Astrology monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember thatif you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. In fact, these horoscopes are even more helpful if read for your rising sign (Ascendant).

If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor the Cafe Astrology quickAscendant Lookup.

We’ve divided our 2026 monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember thatif you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign.

In fact, these horoscopes are even more helpful if read for your rising sign (Ascendant). If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor the Cafe Astrology quickAscendant Calculator.

The month’s energies are natural for looking within, dear Leo. Finances, mainly shared money and property, loans, and support, deserve special attention. A passion project or special relationship can consume much of your attention. You’re in good shape to get in better touch with your inner power and recognize or build upon support from others. Opportunities to pool your resources with someone can emerge. Exploring new ideas is also in focus, particularly as March progresses.

yearly.overview: A powerful year is ahead for you, dear Leo. Jupiter will move into your sign mid-year, sparking a personal new beginning of sorts and upping your personal magnetism to new heights. Until then, you are in a strong period for healing and doing inner work.
yearly.summary:
A powerful year is ahead for you, dear Leo. Jupiter will move into your sign mid-year, sparking a personal new beginning of sorts and upping your personal magnetism to new heights. Until then, you are in a strong period for healing and doing inner work.

In the first half of 2026, you’re especially drawn to your inner world. This period offers a sense of security in introspection. You might sometimes prefer to keep to yourself, where it seems safer and happier, but you can also be a pillar of support for others. It doesn’t feel like a time for major changes or decisions. In reality, you’re in a phase of significant soul-searching, questioning your approaches and paths, and it’s a valuable process.

It’s a powerful period for healing and serving – and thoroughly enjoying the process! There is, however, a tendency to overdo escapism, which should be watched. Perhaps your most important work in early 2026 is finding peace with the past, which will free you up for better enjoyment of the Jupiter-in-Leo transit that begins on June 30th and runs well into 2027.

July ushers in Jupiter into your sign, and you’re coming into your own–and into the light. The second half of the year is about awakening. Your desire to truly live life, rather than simply go through the motions, takes over. You project yourself with more confidence, and you’re letting go of past, more immature behavior patterns and becoming especially comfortable in your own skin. You’re improving your personal presentation in some manner. Personal pleasures, freedom, self-expression, and creativity are big on your list of priorities.

Exciting energy is with you in your love life. What is most important to you at this point in your life is a meeting of minds. In the first half of the year, love may be on the complicated side. There may be a relationship that is private or sacrificial in some manner. From mid-year forward, there is a romantic revelation, blossoming, or awakening. It’s also a strong time for adventure, education, and recognition of your creative talents.

A long-term cycle that’s influenced your career for many years is coming to an end in April. With this cycle’s end, dramatic ups and downs in your career path tend to subside. You’ll enjoy more predictability with your reputation, profession, life path, or status. Your aspirations begin to evolve. The cycle that starts as this one ends is bound to shake up your social circle. Some friendships may be left behind, and new ones made, although they may not be quite as reliable as the ones you had in the past. You may be moving with a new or different crowd in the years ahead. You are less prone to rebel in 2026 and more inclined to live authentically.

A new theme is weaving into your life this year, starting with the Solar Eclipse in February. Especially from the last week of July onward, your personality and partnerships can evolve. Your definitions of “me” and “you” are transforming. Issues of personal courage, confidence, and independence come to the fore. In particular, the North Node in your partnership sector from July onward nudges you toward better balancing and understanding your needs for independence and partnership, with an emphasis on improving negotiations, compromise, and one-on-one connecting.

With both Saturn and Neptune visiting your spirit sector starting early in the year, it’s a powerful time for special attention to courses or training, as well as for your voice! People are very interested in what you have to share. You’ll be firming up (and perhaps putting to the test) your beliefs or educational pursuits. Your attitude, outlook, and worldview are evolving in 2026. Life begins to feel more stable and directed, and your increased self-awareness puts you in a better position to make better decisions.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

For Leo, your special attention to structure and discipline, combined with some room for spontaneity and innovation, can help boost your career or reputation. You see definite improvements in your life as you relinquish rigidity and pressure while sticking with reliability and order. Getting your finances and support situation sorted out can motivate and inspire your work. This period rewards attention to practical and emotional needs, and fulfilling pursuits can result.

daily.summary: The Moon heads into your intimacy sector today, dear Virgo, for a stay of a couple of days. You’re inclined to take things a little more seriously than usual with this transit, and this can be particularly the case today with the Moon’s meet-up with Saturn and the Sun parallel to Saturn. These are powerful influences for getting to the bottom of a problem, researching or investigating, or pouring your energy into an absorbing project or activity. Dealing with a block or responsibility can lead to some important improvements. It’s a good time to piece things together one at a time and attend to various details. Complications are possible, but you may not feel you have the emotional bandwidth to handle them. Conversations can be exciting or animated as the day advances. Your relationships can feel competitive now, but they can also be motivating.

monthly.summary:
We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Monthly forecasts interpret the transits of the inner planets, including the Sun, Mercury, Venus, and Mars, as well as eclipse and retrograde activity. The month’s themes are summarized in the Overview horoscope section.

Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chartor the Cafe AstrologyAscendant Calculator.

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor the Cafe AstrologyAscendant Calculator.

March is powerful for balance, harmony, and partnerships, dear Virgo, as well as for research and review. You’re finding a better balance, solving problems, and enjoying companionship this month. You're often focused on your relationships and gaining a different perspective on your life. It’s the time of year when others’ agendas and needs tend to come into the spotlight.

There can be new beginnings for an alliance after the New Moon on the 18th, and the 20th brings more forward-looking energy to a relationship. There is a strong focus on partnering, socializing, and getting along with others this month. Financial or intimate matters take on more importance as the month progresses.

yearly.overview: The year ahead brings the potential for growth in your social life, happiness goals, work, and reputation, dear Virgo. In the first half of the year, and especially from March 10th forward, it’s a time for making connections and inspiring new ideas. Your social circle is expanding.
yearly.summary:
The year ahead brings the potential for growth in your social life, happiness goals, work, and reputation, dear Virgo. In the first half of the year, and especially from March 10th forward, it’s a time for making connections and inspiring new ideas. Your social circle is expanding.

Until mid-year, you’re continuing a cycle in which connections to friends, groups, and your community are beneficial and in the spotlight. It’s a strong time to reach out to others, network, and make connections. There can be group involvements that bring you much joy, new friendships that feed your spirit, and a broader focus on “happiness” goals all around.

Virgos are known for their strong connection to work and service. However, while work will assume some importance in 2026, you are now paying more attention to other needs – social, spiritual, and personal. A healing process is underway for you this year. It’s a time of service, but also a time for getting the rest you need. This is a time to detox from pressured situations and goals, and to make more time for sharing, connecting, and community.

The second half of the year brings Jupiter, the planet of abundance, into your privacy zone. This year-long influence (it lasts until July 2027) prefaces Jupiter’s transit of your own sign, which will bring you out of your shell and confident enough to reap your due rewards. Until then, there will be greater emphasis on privacy, downtime, relaxation, meditation, and rest. There can also be some sacrifices made for others, as your own needs seem to be less pressing as those of the people you love. You may be doing a lot for others at this time, and mostly quite happily. You more easily brush aside ego issues, recognizing your contribution to others as highly important. Of course, you need to draw some boundaries, but for the most part, this is all a voluntary process that brings you joy.

There can be a lot of focus on serving the family in the second half of the year. While this is a time for healing from the inside out and some release from the pressures of the world and the pressures you place on yourself, it’s, of course, important to avoid overdoing escapist tendencies. Be sure to check in from time to time and determine whether it’s doing more harm than good.

Overall, beautiful energy is with you for psychological or physical healing programs and efforts. You can experience an awakening of your inner life and powerful intuition. You can improve intimacy in your relationships and in your relationship with yourself. The year can be powerful for healing, socializing, resting, and preparing for the busier years to come.

It’s a good time to gain a supporter, backing, or counseling/advice. There could be a confidant who helps you release some frustrations. Perhaps most importantly, you’re striving toward personal growth on an emotional level, and it’s a rewarding experience.

A long-term influence that cast quite a veil of confusion over your partnership sector ends early this year, and this brings more clarity to your world of committed partnerships. With Saturn consistently in your intimacy sector from mid-February onward, the goal is to identify and then weed out unhealthy attachments or dependencies, whether emotional or financial or both. It’s a powerful process! Saturn acts as a bit of a nag for Virgo – guilt, adjustments, some worry: these are all possible. It also encourages you to manage your debts and adopt better habits.

Uranus heads to the top of your solar chart on April 25th, this time, for the long haul (until 2033). It’s a powerful influence on your social standing, reputation, and career aspirations. You had a sneak peek of this energy last year, and now, it’s sticking. This influence excites your ambitions and encourages you to redefine what you want to do with your life. You may recognize talents that you never knew you had, and this can be a sudden, exciting discovery. Your life path or professional life may be changing now, and for some, challenges with current authority figures can motivate a break from the past.

It’s a time of more experimentation or attention to alternatives regarding your career or reputation. If you’ve felt confined or inauthentic in these areas, this transit is likely to address these problems. There can be times when your need for independence can dominate and drive many of your actions regarding your life path, career, and responsibilities. However, it’s also a time when you feel freer or more confident pursuing your dreams and goals.

daily.summary: The day brings a stronger focus on balancing your life in key ways, dear Libra, and you can be quite focused on your relationships. Fulfilling your responsibilities to someone special can be a theme. What you learn can be reinvested in your relationships, strengthening them. It’s also a good day to apply yourself, especially to pursuits that fulfill you socially and emotionally. Striving for balance and more patience can be rewarding. Your interactions with a significant other can be instructional in some manner, whether it’s a direct or indirect thing. As the day progresses, watch for impatience with details, as working with them can be to your advantage. This is a powerful time to fix problems so that your life runs more smoothly.

monthly.summary:
Cafe Astrology’s Monthly Forecasts are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

We divide our 2026 monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates/decans) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor use Cafe Astrology’sAscendant Calculator.

A strong focus on your wellness and work routines continues in March and gains further traction, dear Libra, but your social life is gaining your attention. It's a time to get your daily affairs and self-care matters into order, and good energy is with you for making adjustments, such as editing or revising.

With your work, methods, habits, or health, you’re likely to be dealing with some backtracking or delays while Mercury is retrograde in your solar sixth house until the 20th. However, overall, the month is strong for enjoying your routines and daily life.

A busy month is pretty much a given, but the Lunar Eclipse on the 3rd can prompt strong feelings, particularly about your need for downtime. It’s important to pay particular attention to your work and chores this month. Still, if you’re overdoing this and failing to take care of your need for mental or emotional refreshment, you’ll get a reminder around this time. Arriving at a balance between work and rest is a challenge, but it’s within reach, and it can be rewarding.

yearly.overview: You’re making progress in the outer world or connecting with your ambitions in empowering ways this year, dear Libra. Setting and pursuing goals can be enjoyable. A fortunate change in status can be in store. A positive attitude towards work brings great rewards. Your innate idealism is also stirring in 2026. You’re reaching out to others, and you are well-received.
yearly.summary:
You’re making progress in the outer world or connecting with your ambitions in empowering ways this year, dear Libra. Setting and pursuing goals can be enjoyable. A fortunate change in status can be in store. A positive attitude towards work brings great rewards. Your innate idealism is also stirring in 2026. You’re reaching out to others, and you are well-received.

Particularly from March until mid-year, you may enjoy positive exposure, promotion, or career recognition or growth. You are learning to “own” what you do and feeling more comfortable in a position of leadership or authority.

Communications, promotion, and word of mouth are especially beneficial. Feeling responsible and competent can empower you, and others will recognize your ability to express yourself clearly and effectively. There can be recognition for mental projects, writing, public speaking, or ideas. Most of the attention you’re getting now is positive.

Even so, the second half of the year can feel much easier all around. Pressures are off – it’s a more anonymous time in many ways, as you are valued for your ability to get along with others more than for your accomplishments and performance. There is a nice feeling of contentment, yet also a subtle pressure-free desire to formulate long-term “happiness” goals as well as openness to change and progress. You’re more interested in contributing to group efforts or your community. Friends can be very helpful and enjoyable.

In love, you require more than the ordinary, humdrum, and regular experiences for your heart to engage. Attracting tumultuous love relationships or controlling or intense people is possible. Casual relationships that end up demanding a lot from you, and possibly draining you, can be in the picture. With committed relationships, you will need to be careful that you’re not holding out for someone unattainable and missing out on more empowering relationship opportunities in the process. Love opportunities can arise in non-routine places or through learning or publishing. Networking is strong for you and opens you up to many new possibilities, which can benefit or initiate a partnership.

New connections are forward-looking and often mutually beneficial, encouraging you to explore relationships that can support your goals. You have an enterprising spirit and a strong sense of fairness. From May forward, if in the midst of studies, watch for sudden changes of heart regarding your areas of focus. Consider whether switching around programs is really worth the extra time. You benefit from living your life according to your own values, not simply reacting to what others are (or aren’t) throwing your way. Rebelling can, eventually, lead you back to yourself with greater understanding, and this is “where you are at” now. A friend could be integral in achieving your goals this year, and partnering with a buddy in some tangible way can be part of the picture.

In recent years, work or daily schedules may have been a little muddled with Neptune’s influence on your work and health sector, and early this year, Neptune permanently leaves this sector. More clarity and purpose will slowly but surely come to you.

Uranus moves into your adventure sector for the long haul this year on April 25th, and this can excite your senses, stirring interest in enjoying some new adventures, whether on the physical or mental plane (or both). You’re opening your mind to new ideas and concepts, and opening your heart to new experiences and ways of approaching your life with this long-term transit that supports your efforts to make meaningful changes. It’s a robust period for sharing your ideas, traveling, publishing, pursuing higher education, or exploring alternative beliefs.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

For Libra, you have support for improving your lifestyle and habits. You can better manage your time, and you’re increasingly more aware of the need for a balanced approach in your relationships, with money, and regarding diet and habits. Separating work and downtime can be key to this. Financial or intimate matters may not always be steady, but this doesn’t compromise your work ethic or subtract from your efforts.

daily.summary: With just a little focus, you can get a lot done today, dear Scorpio. You’re in the right frame of mind for attention to detail, and you can feel quite compelled to take care of business. You’re not in the mood to beat around the bush, and you seem to have an emotional need to get on top of your routine or daily affairs. Still, you’re not content with the monotony of the routine, and it can be a good idea to do new things or combine play and work to keep you engaged. In fact, you may want to renew or refresh a hobby or pastime. Enthusiasm runs high to produce and move things forward, but consider that on this day before Mercury's direct turn, not everything is as it seems. Give things a little more time to unblock.

monthly.summary:
We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor ourQuick Ascendant Calculator here.

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

Opportunities to enjoy and express yourself emerge in March, dear Scorpio. Self-expression through hobbies, recreation, love, and leisure is in focus this month. It's a time to share your affection, joy, and experiences. You also gravitate toward playful, celebratory activities. Even with some related delays or backtracking, due to Mercury's retrograde until the 20th, it’s an excellent time to enjoy yourself.

With a strong focus on your joy sector, it can be a playful period–you’re discovering your needs for pleasure, entertainment, and positive feedback. Your self-discovery process can be remarkable in March. Hobbies, recreation, love, and pleasure are in focus. You're also in an excellent place to get ahead with your tasks, work, chores, and health pursuits. Opportunities can arise from special attention to your duties.

During the retrograde Mercury cycle until the 20th, you may find ways to reconnect with activities that nourish your spirit and encourage expressing yourself more freely. There can be a waiting game, delay, stalling, or catch-up period now, but giving due attention to what you’ve overlooked means you end up ahead of the game, ultimately. It would be wise to go easy on speculation and spending at this time. But while some things remain up in the air, on a higher level, you’re feeling a little more directed and confident that you’ll find the right path.

yearly.overview: The year ahead is a period for learning and manifesting, dear Scorpio. The first half of 2026 is a powerful time to hone your expertise and gain experience. You’re learning about the world around you and updating your skills.
yearly.summary:
The year ahead is a period for learning and manifesting, dear Scorpio. The first half of 2026 is a powerful time to hone your expertise and gain experience. You’re learning about the world around you and updating your skills.

Until June 30th, study and learn what you can while your mind is a sponge, while educational opportunities are abundant, and while good teachers or mentors tend to be more available to you. This way, you’ll be able to take fuller advantage of the career peak coming that begins as early as mid-year. There’s money here, in addition to a stronger feeling that you’re truly living life, rather than just going through the motions.

From mid-February forward, organizing your daily routines and meeting responsibilities head-on is in focus. At the same time, pressures from both Neptune and Saturn release from romantic relationships and your world of leisure and entertainment, lightening your load. These areas have been heavier in recent years, and you’re likely to feel freer to enjoy your creative and romantic world going forward.

The second half of the year is strong for finances. You’re projecting an image that shows others you truly value yourself, which can attract respect and possibly also monetary rewards. It’s a time to put yourself out there. People notice you, respond to you, respect you, andvalueyou. You might gain recognition for your natural talents. There can be a promotion, the start of a new business or expansion of a current one, or a boost in a relationship with a parent.

Partnerships may have been a wildcard in your life for many years, but this is set to change from April 25th onward. In recent years, you’ve likely experienced experimental or alternative ways of relating, whether this was voluntary or not. You are now moving into the position to process the lessons you’ve learned about your expectations of others and what you truly want from a partnership. You also benefit from living your life according to your own values, not merely reacting to what others are –or aren’t– throwing your way. Rebelling can eventually lead you back to yourself with greater understanding, and this is where you’re at on this journey in 2026.

You’ll find people in your life less rebellious or unpredictable. Even so, some experimentation with relationships is likely to continue. Your attitude towards intimacy and finances will change over the coming years as you open yourself to new pleasures and detach from old habits, tastes, and desires. You’ll also be exploring different financial arrangements. Unexpected events and feelings are stirring regarding your intimate life, financial life, and support systems. On some level, you’re seeking more freedom with your sexuality, in your relationships, and regarding support or attachments. Freeing yourself from limiting expectations or restrictions can figure strongly now.

There can be changing attitudes toward domestic life and family this year, or your roles are evolving, and issues with control and dependency may surface. You could be more involved in or invest more in your home and family.

With your daily life, you’re bringing more ambition, common sense, and the ability to turn your plans into reality to the table from mid-February forward. It’s a powerful time to get started on a healthy lifestyle change or to discipline yourself to get a job done, and done well!

This year, you’re reaching a new understanding of your goals and believing more powerfully in your general direction. Your efforts to revamp your daily routines and pursue wellness help round out your life and create better opportunities to succeed. Good energy is with you as you bring more structure to your life without compromising your need for imagination and entertainment. It’s a time when believing in yourself, your competency, and your ability to take the lead opens up opportunities to you.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

daily.summary: Security and stability are prioritized goals right now, dear Sagittarius, while you're also seeking natural, easy self-expression. The Moon heads into your creativity sector for a stay of a couple of days--an area of your solar chart that rules recreation, leisure, and the pursuit of pleasure and joy. Still, with Saturn in this sector, your idea of relaxation can be someone’s idea of work! Being more structured with your downtime can be beneficial for you at this time. Spending time doing productive things can be appealing, even soothing. You can take particular pleasure in coming up with strategies, plans, and workable solutions to problems. Still, on this day before the end of Mercury's retrograde, some things are still up in the air.

monthly.summary:
We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

Sagittarius datesare approximately from November 22 to December 21. However, it’s important to note that all Sun sign dates are approximate since they change from year to year. In other words, they’re dependent on your birth year, and in some cases, birth time. If your birth date is on or near either of these dates, then you may have a Sagittarius Sun sign or something else (Scorpio or Capricorn). Be certain with the following tool:What’s My Sun Sign?

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor useCafe Astrology’s Ascendant Calculator.

Much energy centers around the home or with family this month, dear Sagittarius. Surrounding yourself with familiar faces and places comes naturally. You require some anchoring and centering! With Mercury retrograde until the 20th, you’ll deal with minor problems and delays, which can undoubtedly slow you down, but pacing yourself should be relatively straightforward.

March is strong for making memories with family or for getting some much-needed downtime. Domestic life may not always run smoothly, but this is an excellent time for making yourself more comfortable. Later in the month, a shift of focus to more creative, sociable, and pleasure-seeking activities occurs.

yearly.overview: The year ahead is strong for passion projects, shared resources, intimacy, publishing, and connecting, dear Sagittarius. Absorbing pursuits, deeper relationships, and exciting personal interests are in store. The second half of 2026 finds you more interactive and adventurous, but until then, you’re doing important work as you connect with your deeper needs and desires.
yearly.summary:
The year ahead is strong for passion projects, shared resources, intimacy, publishing, and connecting, dear Sagittarius. Absorbing pursuits, deeper relationships, and exciting personal interests are in store. The second half of 2026 finds you more interactive and adventurous, but until then, you’re doing important work as you connect with your deeper needs and desires.

The year 2026 brings strong energy to your intimate world and, later, excellent opportunities for self-expression and adventure. Booster transits benefit your relationships with banks, taxes, debts, financial advisors, loans, and investments. You might never have reached such depths in a relationship until now. Psychology and other healing methods can be in the picture, and most helpful.

Good energy is with you for shared resources in 2026; for example, a partner’s income increases, or you pool resources in a new living arrangement. Your intimate life is enriched through opening up to someone and enjoying new experiences, a supportive friendship is in the spotlight, or you learn much more about yourself and your deeper needs.

The second half of the year is especially growth-oriented in more explicit, tangible ways. Benefits can come through long-distance experiences and people. You come out of your “shell” in many ways as you enter a decidedly more outgoing phase of your life. You’re awakening to new ways of expressing yourself, learning about others and the world around you, a spirit for adventure, and a sense that you are truly living your life, not just going through the motions. It can be a time to update your skills, pursue higher education, or enjoy a special interest. You are approaching a peak period for career and recognition that begins in mid-2027, and now is the time to prepare.

This is also a favorable time for publishing, promotion, travel, language learning, teaching, spirituality, sports, competition, outdoor adventures, and so forth. Learning is very enjoyable. It’s easier than usual to win approval from teachers, instructors, or mentors, and to connect with good ones.

Creatively speaking, while your general demeanor may be on the serious side this year, you are discovering highly unique and creative ways of expressing yourself. You are looking for more from love – it’s increasingly about intimacy as well as mystical or romantic elements. You are attracting unusual, sometimes elusive or mysterious, people into your experience.

A long-standing influence leaves your life on April 25th, and it’s one that wreaked some havoc on your daily schedules and work. Now and in the years to come, a more scheduled, organized life is within reach. At the same time, Uranus moves into opposition to your sign for seven years. You had a sneak peek of this last year, and now this transit is sticking (from April 25th onward). Big changes in the dynamics of close partnerships (personal and business ones) are necessary as Uranus moves through your partnership sector, shaking up the status quo. You may need to give a partner more freedom and space, and there may be times when you feel you suffer as a result. However, it can also be a time of brand new approaches to relating that are exciting and rewarding, even if at times they feel uprooting.

You’re discovering more wonder in a creative project, romantic relationship, entertainment, or a special pastime or hobby this year. Still, it’s also where you’re ready to buckle down, focus, and improve. Combining the responsible and more imaginative elements of your interactions and activities can be most successful. Your creative, romantic, or recreational life is developing in some ways, but in others, it is becoming more disciplined. You can find it satisfying to hunker down and get serious about love and joy! You’re a little more practical and cautious with matters of the heart and personal enjoyment.

You’ll find the year quite supportive of creative expression, love, personal fulfillment and enjoyment, education, and spirit, especially in July and August. A stronger sense of meaning and purpose drives you. A building interest in broadening your mental experiences and finding expression of your personality through them, perhaps through higher education or exploring different philosophies of life, is with you.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

daily.summary: This is a day for special attention to home and family, your support system, and personal matters, dear Capricorn. It can also be a time of interesting studies or gathering important intel. You can be focused on the practical or functional side of your domestic world or personal life today. As you straighten out your home environment, you may experience improved inner clarity. Dialing things back a little makes sense now, but you’re likely to want to be productive. There is some tendency for misunderstandings or mental limbo on this day before Mercury ends its retrograde, but these things can help you see flaws where you missed them previously. You have more mental energy than usual.

monthly.summary:
Monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. An overview of the month’s themes is provided, along with more specific transits of the Sun, Mercury, Venus, Mars, eclipses (if they occur this month), and retrograde activity.

Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here. Aquick Ascendant lookup tool can be found here.

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here, or useCafe Astrology’s Ascendant Calculator.

March brings a strong focus on connecting, learning, transportation, communications, and daily affairs, dear Capricorn. While there can be ups and downs and delays to manage, you’ll ultimately get to see which of your projects are genuinely viable and worth your effort. You’re also likely to enjoy your home and personal life more fully this month. It’s a highly expressive period, even with Mercury retrograde until the 20th. A Lunar Eclipse can prompt cravings for bigger things or some distance from the mundane affairs of your life, and you’ll seek some escapes from time to time.

Mercury's retrograde cycle, lasting until March 20th, occurs in your communications sector and can signal delays and slowdowns. Still, the workarounds you find as a result of mishaps can end up helping you or turning your attention to things you’ve overlooked. Your words may not be perfect, but knowing this, your manner and charm can make up for it.

yearly.overview: The following full yearly horoscope for Capricorn includes an overview and summary, outer plant influences, and major aspects (such as the Saturn-Uranus sextile) in 2026 and how they specifically affect Capricorn, and horoscopes divided into decans.
yearly.summary:
The following full yearly horoscope for Capricorn includes an overview and summary, outer plant influences, and major aspects (such as the Saturn-Uranus sextile) in 2026 and how they specifically affect Capricorn, and horoscopes divided into decans.

Significant partnerships and relationships can be a strong focus this year, and you can enjoy opportunities to improve a close relationship or enter into a new partnership. People tend to be supportive of you, and you can find much joy with a special someone. Some of you could be entering profitable business partnerships. There can be new levels of intimacy from mid-2026 onward, and great pleasure in being close to someone. New depths (and heights) can be experienced in a relationship this year, which can add to your inner glow.

Eclipses this year encourage you to pay special attention to how you communicate, connect, and present your ideas. Polishing these things will go a long way towards your happiness and fulfillment. This can also be a time for boosting a relationship with a sibling, classmate, or neighbor. More involvement and improvement figure strongly.

However, you’re also beginning to pay special attention to your income, resources, valuables, and natural talents as a new eclipse set moves in. Getting your assets sorted can be an important focus. With money or things, you can be going through restructuring, possibly putting some business projects to rest. You can be very resourceful when it comes to recycling or using what you already own in different ways. You might find unique products to sell and market.

While Saturn is asking you to be responsible in your domestic world, Uranus wants you to find a more authentic approach to your job, daily life, and routines. This can be tricky at times, but manageable. You’re moving toward a fresh approach to your work and the daily details of your life. Irregular schedules and perhaps some disruptions and tensions are possible this year as you adjust to this influence that’s with you from April 25th onward. Your working hours may become non-traditional, or a job may be unconventional. You are restless with routines and tend to answer to your own internal rhythm rather than paying attention to society’s (and nature’s!) rhythms. Work that is limiting or lifeless drags you down more than usual.

During this new cycle that will stick with you for about seven years, it would be wise to do work or enjoy routines that offer you not only variety and stimulation but also the chance to invent and create. You may also be interested in alternative health methods. You could benefit greatly from yoga or other mind-body therapies now.

It’s also interesting to note that Uranus is leaving your sector of romance and creativity for good in April this year, since it’s been such a long-term influence. This can point to some settling down and greater reliability in romance, relationships with your children, creative projects, and hobbies, whichever is applicable.

Focusing on compassion and intuition as tools to help you better understand yourself and others, particularly family, can be especially helpful this year, but you’re also in need of more structure and practical attention to your domestic world. Improving your living conditions, self-esteem, and comfort levels are priorities. Some of this process is very internalized–you’re getting in deeper touch with yourself, determining what you truly want from life, what childhood conditioning issues are holding you back, and just how much inner power and strength you possess. A bit of self-absorption seems necessary.

Projects you begin this year may very well last–the very beginnings of long-term businesses or projects might happen for you in 2026. You seek comfort and stability, but also improvement, in your personal life. A more inspired yet practical approach to your domestic world can enrich your life and boost your intimate life or passion projects. It’s a powerful time for long-term financial planning and strengthening your financial picture.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

daily.summary: This can be a good day for making the best use of your talents and resources, dear Aquarius, but it's a powerful time for sorting out your thoughts. The Moon heads into your solar sector of communication for a stay of a couple of days, meeting Saturn there, and obligations are on your mind. A bit of self-discipline can go a long way, as events of the day might awaken a need to get going on something for which you’ve been procrastinating. You can be ready to do what it takes to solve problems and jump hurdles, if need be, to achieve your goals. However, on this day before Mercury ends its retrograde, there are a few details missing, and you may need to wait and see before you can reach conclusions.

monthly.summary:
Monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. An overview of the month’s influences is provided, as well as more specific transits of the Sun, Mercury, Venus, Mars, and eclipses (if they occur this month), as well as retrograde activity.Aquarius Daily Horoscopesreveal further details.

Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor use ourquick Ascendant lookup toolto get straight to the point!

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

March brings strong energy for enjoying yourself and building something important to you, dear Aquarius. The desire to boost your income or take care of your things is with you. As long as you avoid impulse buys, you should come out ahead! Your desire to settle in and focus on building, collecting, and getting comfortable is strong. It’s a month to get your bearings, with an emphasis on your sector of resources. You are encouraged to slow down, work things out, draw on patience, and build and develop special projects. The better you accept this pace, the greater the rewards! Still, it can also be a pleasant time for learning and connecting as the month advances.

With Mercury retrograde until the 20th and the Lunar Eclipse on the 3rd, it’s important to focus on developing what you have rather than pushing forward with brand-new beginnings. Fortunately, your astrology encourages a take-it-easy approach this month, and it’s well-timed– you’ll find it more natural than most other signs to slow things down.

yearly.overview: Most notable bright areas this year – and there are plenty – are self-care and self-improvement endeavors, work, long-term partnerships, and friendships. Your schedule is likely to be quite full in the first half of the year, but mostly pleasantly so. For those of you in need of work or who want to improve their daily routines or working life, this is a fabulous time to do so, although you’ll need to watch for taking on too much.
yearly.summary:
Most notable bright areas this year – and there are plenty – are self-care and self-improvement endeavors, work, long-term partnerships, and friendships. Your schedule is likely to be quite full in the first half of the year, but mostly pleasantly so. For those of you in need of work or who want to improve their daily routines or working life, this is a fabulous time to do so, although you’ll need to watch for taking on too much.

You may be meeting new friends through the work you do or through your pursuit of health and wellness goals. While you can feel pressure on a personal level, you’re in a strong position for comfortably meeting your responsibilities this year. Finances are less confusing or uncertain in 2026. Transportation and communication issues can be in strong focus as you find more efficient ways to get around and connect.

The second half of the year can be quite excellent for partnerships, whether these are business, romantic, or both. Opportunities for relationships can open up for you. For some, a friendship can move to a whole new level. Negotiations and counseling situations can be beneficial. You might find yourself in a teaching or counseling role or as a trusted advisor. One-to-one counseling sessions can be very helpful. Getting married or entering a new long-term partnership is possible; partnered Aquarians will benefit from infusing their current relationship with more fun, enjoyment, generosity, and vision.

There may have been times when you felt you were alone and in charge, but in 2026, that’s changing. People who have your interests at heart or who uplift you can enter your life, or existing relationships can improve significantly. There can be great innovations in your life, with new ways to communicate and move your life forward. There can be a lot of activity with writing, public speaking, new interests, and exciting friendships. You’ll require stimulating or simply new and different entertainment.

With Pluto in your sign, you are learning about your personal power, sometimes through challenging life lessons and experiences. The temptation may be to attempt to control or micro-manage things, but you’ll better experience your own freedom if you can resist this urge.

Saturn and Neptune moving out of your finance sector early in 2026 takes pressure and restriction off money matters. Your relationship with your money and things has evolved, and you’re now less inhibited about expressing your natural talents. This theme is helped further as Uranus, your modern planetary ruler, heads into your creativity sector on April 25th for a visit of about seven years. It’s a powerful time to connect with and explore your creativity.

The long-term cycle that brought change and unpredictability to your home and family life ends this year on April 25th. This shift takes quite a bit of pressure off. At the same time, a new cycle begins, and creatively speaking, you’re blossoming as you discover new and unique forms of creative or playful expression.

Uranus in your solar fifth house is a relative newcomer and a long-term guest, bringing excitement – perhaps even thrills – but also possible instability in romance and creative output from time to time. You’re discovering your inner child and getting in touch with your creative muse, and there can be some ups and downs in the process. These things are not something you can schedule or control! You may be attracting unusual, progressive, alternative, or erratic people into your world now, particularly on a romantic level. You may also need to deal with matters of independence and personal freedom with your children or in your dating life, if applicable.
