All in all, however, this is a wonderful transit for loosening you up and encouraging a more casual, natural, and creative approach to expressing yourself.

Eclipses this year put special focus on spending habits — emphasizing the need to take charge of your finances —and on your relationships with others — spotlighting the need to find a balance between independence and your need for other people in your life.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

daily.summary: Applying yourself to your most important priorities comes naturally today, dear Pisces. You may do your best work today at your own pace or independently, as others may only slow you down at the moment. You can have a strong desire to get your practical affairs in order today, although some details may be missing on this day before Mercury ends its retrograde. The Moon heads into your sector of resources and security for a couple of days, and paying special attention to detail or your money and personal possessions can be in focus. You’re in a strong position to take stock of what you have and what you might need. You're in better shape today if you think ahead rather than worry about immediate gratification.

Keep in mind that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor ourquick Ascendant Calculator.

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

The month ahead is a strong one for you, dear Pisces, particularly regarding personal influence and finances. The New Moon on the 18th launches a period of increased personal power and charisma, and on the 20th, Mercury ends its retrograde cycle in your sign. These events give you the green light to move personal projects forward.

While two outer planets have officially left Pisces, you have a big showing of planets and lights in your sign in March. True, Mercury is retrograde for close to three weeks in your sign (until the 20th). However, it gives your emotions and feelings the chance to catch up with your mind, which is often ahead of the pack. Huge insights and the beginnings of significant new ideas can emerge now.

Venus is in Pisces only until the 4th, adding loads to your charm, and the Sun is in your sign until the 20th, increasing your personal influence and presence. Mars heads into Pisces on the 2nd, enlivening your month and stirring your spirit for action. Mercury does help you as well. While you may be putting your foot in your mouth from time to time, you’re also working on clarifying your thoughts and ideas, and you’re getting plenty of room to do so. Take care of unfinished business so that you can begin anew with less baggage. By April, you’ll have a keen sense of what you want and need.

yearly.overview: Saturn and Neptune leave your sign early in the year, dear Pisces, and you feel more grounded and less pressured–freer to be yourself. Your definition of comfort, abundance, security, and pleasure is evolving in 2026. Romantic, playful, and casual relationships are in the spotlight. New avenues for recreation, amusement, creative expression, and hobbies can open up. Pursuing your joy comes more naturally.
yearly.summary:
Saturn and Neptune leave your sign early in the year, dear Pisces, and you feel more grounded and less pressured–freer to be yourself. Your definition of comfort, abundance, security, and pleasure is evolving in 2026. Romantic, playful, and casual relationships are in the spotlight. New avenues for recreation, amusement, creative expression, and hobbies can open up. Pursuing your joy comes more naturally.

2026 is a time to explore your desires, different ways of “playing”, and enjoy yourself in the process. By July, ideally, you’ll have found more ways to entertain yourself and others, and the focus shifts to work, health, and daily habits. Opportunities to expand your reach and to improve your sense of wellness abound. The year ahead is one of work and play, but you may take either to excess at times! With some attention to moderation, however, it’s a powerful year for enjoying and expressing yourself more freely, as well as for connecting with a sense of purpose and usefulness.

There may have been times when you were more aloof and introspective, and certainly less spontaneous in recent years. In 2026, a stronger, more realistic, and more mature “you” emerges. At the same time, you feel lighter. Love can be fun and casual, and admirers can be plenty.

The year brings the need for special attention to your money, things, and feelings of comfort and security as Saturn and Neptune move into your resources sector. Your mission may be to watch your money more closely, reduce or eliminate redundancies, and treat yourself with more respect. The idea now is to take care of your resources so that they take care of you! Wherever Saturn is currently transiting, we may face some lessons, but while there can be some need to downsize or clean up your act, it’s not anything you can’t handle, and it will serve you exceptionally well as you advance.

While Saturn is asking you to be responsible with your money, Neptune has a longer-term mission in mind that breaks down rigidity in your money-making and money-handling methods. Uranus wants you to find a more authentic or spontaneous approach to your home life. This can be tricky at times, but manageable. Irregular schedules and perhaps some disruptions and tensions are possible this year as you adjust to these influences.

Uranus moving out of your communications sector in April suggests better daily schedules and routines, plus a stronger ability to focus on your studies. Tuning out distractions comes more readily this year. For some, this means settling on a course of study after a lengthy period of uncertainty.

From April 25th onward, living conditions and arrangements may feel less predictable. The same old domestic routines may no longer be viable. You may not be as settled with your living arrangements or in your inner world, and you’re on a journey of finding yourself now and in the years ahead. If you’ve been rooted in one place, this may change, even if you’ve felt quite fine in your position. Moving may happen, and it can be a relatively sudden thing for some. Others are seeking change within their homes or in their living conditions, and there can be much activity in the domestic environment. This influence stirs up quite a bit in the psyche, too, and Pisces will find much is going on under the hood. There is an edgier quality to your personality — you’re discovering your rough edges and learning to manage them. The theme is liberation as you free yourself from restrictive, limiting circumstances and attitudes.

From June 30th onward, wonderful energy is with you for your work, daily routines, and health endeavors. Your natural talents and skills are in high demand. If you’re looking for work, this is an excellent time for opportunities. It’s also strong for innovative wellness routines. You bring more confidence and energy to your daily life, chores, and self-improvement efforts. Watch for overload, but do take advantage of this time to make real improvements. Paying more attention to the mind/spirit element of your work and health can do wonders for you.

Your definitions of comfort, abundance, security, and pleasure are evolving, which affects how you treat your things, your domestic world, and your money. Your efforts to improve spending and structure or organize your things can boost your family life.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.
